START_TRIAGE.question: Are you facing a dismissal issue, or are you looking to request a Flexible Work Arrangement (FWA)?

DISMISSAL_TIMELINE_CHECK.question: For a Wrongful Dismissal claim at TADM, you must file within 1 month from your last day of employment. Has it been more than 1 month since your dismissal?

TADM_TIME_BARRED_WARNING.content: Time Bar Rule: Wrongful dismissal claims generally must be filed at TADM within 1 month of the last day of employment. Your claim may be time-barred.

FWA_PROBATION_CHECK.question: Have you completed your probation period with your current employer?

PROBATION_LIMIT_WARNING.content: Probation Limit: Under the Tripartite Guidelines, formal FWA request rights only begin after you have completed your probation. You may still make an informal request.

READY_FOR_FWA_SUBMISSION.content: Procedural triage complete. Passing you to the FairWork Quant Agent.

READY_FOR_EMPLOYMENT_QUANT.content: Procedural triage complete. Passing you to the Employment Quant Agent.
